title: We at myHerb have noticed a big & positive change made by monday.com for positive impact on sustainability & Environmental issues
excerpt:
We have witnessed a remarkable and beneficial change as a result of integrating monday.com :heart: :clap: at myHerb. This has led to a notable improvement in our approach to sustainability and environmental concerns. 
Th…

posts.author: myHerb (Aaron Levin)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have witnessed a remarkable and beneficial change as a result of integrating monday.com at myHerb. This has led to a notable improvement in our approach to sustainability and environmental concerns.

The platform has allowed us to simplify our workflows, minimize our use of paper, and effectively allocate resources, all of which contributes to our broader commitment to environmental stewardship.

This cutting-edge solution has not only boosted our operational efficiency but has also strengthened our dedication to sustainable business practices.

I have a big plans that will give you a sustainability solutions: with boards, content, Integrative experiences. Maybe monday.com is approaching big changes. that will surprise us. as a time come to step ahead.

I know a little bit about some of the people from the monday team. They are highly intelligent with a deep vision for the long term and strong commitment to monday’s goal!. One of the most friendly and conected working teams out there.
